name: TheHive (Security Incident Response Platform)
pricing_notes: Open source (SSPL); StrangeBee; Enterprise plan for RBAC/SSO

auth.notes: API key per user; Bearer token header

performance.notes: Self-hosted platform; latency depends on deployment

agent_readiness.notes: Security Incident Response Platform (SIRP). thehive4py Python client. Case management, alert triage, task tracking, observables. MISP integration for threat intel sharing. Cortex integration for automated analysis (analyzers/responders). Cases → Tasks → Observables. Alert workflow. Webhooks for SIEM integration. Elasticsearch backend. Used by SOCs, CERTs, incident response teams. Integrates with Splunk, QRadar, PAN Cortex XSOAR.

gotchas: v5 breaking changes from v4 (significant API changes)
SSPL license may restrict commercial SaaS deployment
Elasticsearch storage requirements significant at scale
best_when: SOC and CERT teams needing incident case management
Organizations wanting open-source Jira for security incidents
Teams integrating threat intel (MISP) with case management
Automated alert triage with Cortex analyzers
avoid_when: Small teams needing simple incident tracking (Jira may suffice)
summary: TheHive is an open-source security incident response platform (SIRP) for SOCs and CERTs. Case management, alert triage, task tracking, observables. MISP integration for threat intel. Cortex for automated analysis. thehive4py Python client. Self-hosted with Elasticsearch. Used by incident response teams for structured case management. Complex deployment but powerful integration ecosystem.
